1. Code validation.details: Typecheck, lint, i18n key parity, and single-source version contracts verified statically

2. Database contract validation.details: Database compatibility manifest structure and forward-only migration chain order verified statically

3. Local integration tests.details: Payload builders, financial formulas, Zod schemas, RLS policy definitions, and SemVer upgrade policies verified statically

4. Staging deployment.details: BLOCKED: Requires STAGING_SUPABASE_URL, STAGING_DATABASE_URL, and VERCEL_TOKEN repository secrets in GitHub Actions

5. Staging smoke tests.details: NOT RUN: Dependent on Stage 4 Staging Deployment

6. Manual approval.details: NOT RUN: Manual approval becomes available only after Stages 4 and 5 are STAGING PASS
